form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on March 30 over 295m at this track behind Marjie's Magic beaten a head (17.38) in a Class 1. Can continue the solid form.

form.formComment: Finished third (17.63) at this track last time making it three placings in a row. Drawn close to the inside. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.40) in a Class 2, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Does down grade and has place claims.
